metadata.title: Tunnel Quantum Pressure Expansion
metadata.loc_class: QC - Physics: waves, acoustics, and fluid dynamics
metadata.creator: Daniel Alexander Trawin

master_row.title: Tunnel Quantum Pressure Expansion
master_row.canonical_statement: \begin{theorem}[Flux Tunneling] For separation distance $d(t)$ and barrier potential $U(d)$, the quantum tunneling probability is \begin{equation} P_{tunnel} = \sum_{n=1}^{\infty} A_n \exp\left(-\frac{S_n}{\hbar}\right) \end{equation} where the instanton action \begin{equation} S_n = n \int_{d_{min}}^{d_{bolt}} \sqrt{2m_{eff}U(d')} \, dd' \end{equation} \end{theorem}
master_row.formation_note: Recovered from a D:\All source document under ‘Quantum Tunneling Enhancement’.
master_row.dictionary: Tunnel Quantum Pressure Expansion — P_tunnel = ∑_n=1^∞ A_n exp (-(S_n)/(ħ) )
master_row.encyclopedia: The entry preserves the equation exactly as extracted from `00_Engine\Lemma-Maker\Prism\topological_quantum_storage_paper.tex` for registry alignment and later derivation.

formal_status.note: Proof package captures the theorem row, metadata, source truth, TeX source, and current semantic translation status.
